title: cDNA protocol - Thermo Scientific RevertAid RT
steps: Thaw RNA and reagents on ice. Label four foil lids: one to replace RNA lid, one for reaction and two for aliquots
UV sterilize 3 RNase free PCR plates, 8 boxes 10uL filter tips, and DEPC treated H 2 O
Once thawed, flash spin down RNA in plate centrifuge and spin down reagents in mini centrifuge
Add 1 µL RNA ( .1 ng - 5 µg ) to empty PCR plate

Add 1 µL Random Hexamer Primer Thermo Fisher Catalog #SO142 If not using Random Hexamer Primer Thermo Fisher Catalog #SO142 protocol will be different. See product handbook RevertAid RT Reverse Transcription Kit Thermo Fisher Catalog #K1691
Add 10 µL DEPC treated H 2 O If used amount other than 1 µL RNA (step 1), adjust H 2 O volume to bring total reaction volume to 12 µL
Add 1 µL RiboLock RNase Inhibitor Thermo Scientific Catalog #EO0381 (20 U/uL)
Add 2 µL dNTP Mix (10 mM each) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #R0191
Add 1 µL RevertAid Reverse Transcriptase (200 U/µL) Thermo Fisher Catalog #EP0441 Total reaction volume should be 20 µL
Mix gently with pipette and centrifuge briefly on "short"
Place in thermocycler and run program "cDNA" Thermocycler cDNA program: Lid 105°C. 25°C 5 min, 42°C 60 min, 70°C for 5 min, ∞ hold 4°C.
Aliquot product into microplates and seal with labeled foil lid
Store at -20 °C for up to 1 week or -80 °C for longer term storage
creator: Jocelynz
